scripts.test:unit: node --test --test-name-pattern="publication clock|draft and missing|location eligibility|location-service eligibility|sitemap normalisation|location sitemap|private" tests/publication-controls.test.js
scripts.test:integration: node --test --test-name-pattern="server insight query|ineligible direct routes|location catalogue" tests/publication-controls.test.js
scripts.typecheck: node --check api/lib/publication-eligibility.js && node --check api/lib/supabase.js && node --check api/lib/location-catalogue.js && node --check api/content-page.js && node --check api/sitemap.js && node --check scripts/verify-publication-controls.js && esbuild frontend/assets/js/cms.js frontend/assets/js/pages/service-detail.js --bundle --format=esm --platform=browser --external:https://* --outdir=/tmp/xtradite-publication-typecheck --log-level=error
scripts.verify: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run check:routes && npm run check:sitemap && npm run check:structured-data && npm run check:migration
scripts.build: npm run verify && npm run build:jam && node scripts/inject-jam.js && npm run build:seo && npm run validate:jam
